author_confirmation: Signed consent forms are retained for all three volunteers reported in the manuscript.
repository_interpretation: Retention is confirmed; the signed documents were not reviewed or published, and permission for open data sharing remains unverified.
privacy_handling: Do not publish signed forms or direct identifiers.

author_confirmation: The author initially reported that no written ethics approval, exemption, waiver, or other determination had been obtained.
repository_interpretation: This initial report was superseded later the same day when the advisor supplied a CFATA/CEID approval letter.
privacy_handling: Retained to preserve the audit chronology; contains no participant identifiers.

author_confirmation: The advisor provided a CFATA/CEID approval letter for the centre's non-invasive biofluid spectroscopy protocol.
repository_interpretation: The document was reviewed and recorded in metadata/ethics_approval_record.csv; its retrospective and public-data-sharing scope still requires written clarification.
privacy_handling: The signed PDF remains private because it contains committee-member signatures.

author_confirmation: V and P are alternative volunteer-code prefixes; the prefix differed because measurements occurred on another date and were performed by another person who selected the code.
repository_interpretation: A prefix change alone must not be counted as a different participant; same-numeric acquisition codes are confirmed in the pseudonymous crosswalk.
privacy_handling: Only pseudonymous prefix semantics are recorded.

author_confirmation: A pseudonymous key connecting the V and P codes is retained.
repository_interpretation: The private key was not reviewed or published; a deidentified code-only crosswalk is recorded without names.
privacy_handling: Do not publish names or the private linkage key.

author_confirmation: Benchtop V2 equals portable P2, V3 equals P3, and V4 equals P4 in the acquisition-code namespace.
repository_interpretation: The same numeric suffix identifies the same pseudonymous acquisition volunteer across V and P prefixes.

author_confirmation: Four volunteers were originally tested; acquisition volunteer 1 produced no usable signal and was excluded, so retained acquisition volunteers 2 through 4 were intentionally renumbered as publication Volunteers 1 through 3.
repository_interpretation: The canonical mapping is acquisition V2/P2 to publication V1, V3/P3 to publication V2, and V4/P4 to publication V3.
privacy_handling: Contains no names, demographics, or private-key values.

author_confirmation: The embedded V2S2 value associated with AA_HS_V1S1_H is a metadata mistake; the correct acquisition session is V2S1.
repository_interpretation: Preserve historical source bytes and record V2S1 as the canonical acquisition/session alias in provenance metadata.
